name: Debrid / Stremio streams
description: Library stream picker, TMDB discovery in the dashboard, Stremio addon + Real-Debrid/TorBox.
overview: Multiple playable sources per library item; optional Stream discovery (TMDB) without library files. Optional TMDB API for id mapping. You must comply with applicable laws and service terms.

versions.changelog: Dashboard Stream discovery (TMDB) and discovery REST API; per-stream library picker; TMDB/TVDB to IMDb mapping; stream list cache.
